description: You are a copy editor for TechHorizons Monthly. Review the draft article at /home/ga/Documents/AI_Draft_2024.odt using Apache OpenOffice Writer with 'Record Changes' enabled. Change the article title from 'Computer Brains are Here' to 'The Evolution of Generative AI', correct the typo 'Generatve' to 'Generative' in the first body paragraph, and delete the third paragraph starting with 'I remember watching Terminator 2...'. Additionally, add a comment to the text 'Large Language Models' in the first paragraph that says 'Define acronym on first use'. Save the reviewed document as /home/ga/Documents/AI_Draft_Reviewed.odt.
